title: Ankr Account Balance Structure
description: Documented structure of the ankr_getAccountBalance response surface.

totalBalanceUsd.description: Aggregate USD value across the assets array, summed by Ankr's price indexer.

assets[].contractAddress: ERC-20 contract address; empty for native asset.
assets[].balanceUsd: USD value at current Ankr price.
assets[].tokenPrice: USD spot price reported by Ankr.

notes: When `onlyWhitelisted` is true (default), Ankr filters out spam/airdrop tokens.
When the `blockchain` param is an array, results are merged across all requested chains.
Pagination is not used; all balances are returned in one response.
